info.title: datalinq
info.description: CLI for DataLinq - a lightweight, high-performance .NET ORM using source generators for immutability and efficient caching - optimized for read-heavy applications.

options.name: --config
options.description: Path to config file

options.name: --datasource
options.description: Name of the database instance on the server or file on disk, depending on the connection type

options.name: --name
options.description: Name in the DataLinq config file

options.name: --type
options.description: Which database connection type to create the database for

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Set output to verbose messages.

options.name: --overwrite-types
options.description: Force overwriting C# property types in existing models with types inferred from the database schema.

options.name: --skip-source
options.description: Skip reading from source models

options.name: --type
options.description: Which database connection type to create the database for

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Set output to verbose messages.
